title: Petite Rivière de l’Artibonite Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Petite Rivière de l’Artibonite, with a Z-Score of +4.80. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Petite Rivière de l’Artibonite is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 15.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 40%, and the wind speed is approximately 2.9 km/h, which is not providing significant relief. 
 The city is experiencing a critical heat wave event, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, indicating the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Petite Rivière de l’Artibonite.
